name: management-portal
description: Operate the management-portal MCP with the full agent discipline in one install — the management-portal skill, the portal-operator subagent, the /portal command, read-after-write hooks, and the MCP server itself.

mcp_api_key.title: Management Portal API Key
mcp_api_key.description: Your management-portal API key (pfk_live_…) from the web app → Settings → API Keys. Stored securely in your OS keychain — never written to disk or committed.
